formulas.name: Law of Superposition
formulas.formula: Older rock layers are buried beneath younger rock layers
formulas.notes: Statement of law by Nicolas Steno

formulas.name: Principle of Original Horizontality
formulas.notes: Statement of principle by Nicolas Steno

formulas.name: Principle of Cross-Cutting Relationships
formulas.formula: Faults, folds, and igneous intrusions cut across rock layers
formulas.notes: Statement of principle by James Hutton

formulas.name: Principle of Inclusions and Exclusions
formulas.formula: Inclusions and exclusions in rocks indicate relative ages
formulas.notes: Statement of principle by James Hutton

formulas.name: Principle of Faunal Succession
formulas.formula: Fossils of different species are found in different rock layers
formulas.notes: Statement of principle by William Smith

formulas.name: Worm Burrows
formulas.formula: Worm burrows are often found in sedimentary rocks
formulas.notes: Indicates the presence of ancient sea floor

formulas.name: Erosion
formulas.formula: Erosion is the process of wearing away the Earth's surface
formulas.notes: Natural process that shapes the landscape

formulas.name: Deposition
formulas.formula: Deposition is the process of depositing sediment
formulas.notes: Natural process that shapes the landscape

formulas.name: Weathering
formulas.formula: Weathering is the process of breaking down rocks
formulas.notes: Natural process that shapes the landscape
